title: Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom
scenario: A raw DTO can be missing required fields. TryFrom gives the adapter a standard fallible conversion into the application command.
instructions: Implement TryFrom<RegisterUserDto> for RegisterUserCommand using RegisterUserValidationError for missing fields.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps dto-tryfrom-validation explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
